description: secretx-signature uses tokio::runtime::Builder and Handle::try_current() in sign_sync(), both of which require the tokio 'rt' feature. Its Cargo.toml declares 'tokio = { workspace = true }' with no feature override, relying silently on inherited workspace features. By contrast, secretx-aws-kms, which also uses tokio runtime APIs, explicitly declares 'tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["rt"] }'. If a future workspace.toml change drops or narrows the tokio feature set, secretx-signature breaks without any local Cargo.toml signal. Fix: add 'features = ["rt"]' to the tokio dependency in secretx-signature/Cargo.toml.
title: secretx-signature: tokio dep missing explicit rt feature
